get.description: Handles the OIDC provider callback after user authentication. Validates the CSRF token, exchanges the authorization code for tokens, verifies the ID token, and issues a session JWT cookie.

302.description: Redirect to app after successful auth

502.description: Token exchange or ID token verification failed

get.description: Returns the OIDC issuer URL, client ID, and scopes so mobile clients only need the Phos server URL to self-configure authentication.
Initiates the OIDC login flow by redirecting the user to the configured identity provider. Stores PKCE and CSRF state in a signed cookie for the callback.
Clears the session cookie and redirects the user to the login page.

302.description: Redirect to login page after clearing session

get.description: Returns the current authenticated user's session claims (subject, name, email) from the session JWT cookie.

post.summary: Exchange OIDC ID token for session JWT
post.description: Mobile clients perform the OIDC Authorization Code + PKCE flow directly with the identity provider, then send the resulting ID token here. Phos validates it against the provider's JWKS and returns a session JWT that can be used in the `Authorization: Bearer` header.
Queue an image enhancement task using a ComfyUI workflow. Creates a background task that processes the shot's original file.

get.description: Returns the workflow and text overrides used to generate each non-original file for a shot.
Check whether ComfyUI is configured and reachable. Returns the connection status and system info.
List ComfyUI enhancement tasks with optional status filtering and pagination.
Retrieve details and current status of a specific enhancement task.

delete.description: Delete a completed or failed enhancement task record.

400.description: Task is not in failed or completed state

post.description: Retry a failed enhancement task. Resets it to pending status for reprocessing.

400.description: Task is not in failed state

get.description: List all imported ComfyUI enhancement workflows available for use.

post.description: Import a ComfyUI workflow JSON for use as an enhancement pipeline.

delete.description: Delete an imported ComfyUI workflow by ID.

get.description: List all prompt presets for a specific workflow.

post.description: Create a new prompt preset for a workflow with saved text overrides.

put.description: Update an existing prompt preset's name, text overrides, or sort order.

delete.description: Delete a prompt preset from a workflow.
Delete a face detection record. Cleans up orphaned people and recalculates shot assignments.

put.description: Reassign a face to a different person. Updates the shot's primary person if needed.

404.description: Face or target person not found

get.description: Get person assignment suggestions for a face based on embedding similarity to existing people.

200.description: List of person suggestions sorted by similarity

get.description: Retrieve the cropped JPEG thumbnail image for a detected face.

404.description: Face not found or source image missing

get.description: Download the original file content by file ID. Returns the raw bytes with the appropriate content type.

delete.description: Delete a non-original file from a shot. The original file cannot be deleted directly — delete the shot instead.

post.description: Manually add a face region to a file with a specified bounding box and person assignment.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: File ID to add a manual face to

put.description: Mark a file as the original (primary) file for its shot, demoting the current original.

get.description: Retrieve a resized thumbnail or video preview for a file. Supports configurable dimensions via query parameters.

post.description: Finalize the import process by running a full library scan and reorganization on newly imported files.

put.description: Upload a raw file for import. The file is written to the import staging area and indexed. Supports up to 1 GB files.

get.description: Return detailed organization statistics including pending reviews, confirmed shots, unsorted shots, and unnamed people.
List all detected people with their name, face count, and a representative thumbnail face ID.

post.description: Create a new named person record that faces can be assigned to.
Merge two or more people into a single person. All faces from the source people are reassigned to the target person.

get.description: Retrieve all shots associated with a specific person, ordered by date.

delete.description: Delete a person and unassign all their faces. Shots will have their primary person recalculated.

get.description: Returns a complete person browse graph with all shots and their file variants in a single response. Designed for offline-first browsing clients.
Retrieve all face thumbnail IDs belonging to a specific person.

post.description: Trigger a background filesystem reorganization that moves files into person-based folder structure.
Trigger a background library scan on the specified path to detect new or changed media files and run face detection.

get.description: List shots with optional filtering by person, date range, review status, and pagination. Returns brief shot metadata suitable for gallery views.

post.description: Confirm the person assignment for multiple shots at once, setting their review status to confirmed.
Reassign multiple shots to a different person in a single operation.
Merge two or more shots into a single shot. All files from the source shots are moved to the target shot.
Mark a pair of similar shots as intentionally separate so they are no longer suggested for merging.

get.description: Retrieve paginated groups of similar shots across the entire library for bulk deduplication review.
Retrieve full details for a single shot including all associated files, detected faces, and person assignments.

put.description: Update shot metadata such as the primary person assignment and review status.

delete.description: Delete a shot and all its associated files from disk and database. This action is irreversible.

get.description: Find shots visually similar to the given shot, grouped by the person they are assigned to. Uses perceptual hash comparison.

post.description: Split selected files out of a shot into a new separate shot. Useful when the scanner incorrectly groups unrelated files together.

get.description: Return aggregate library statistics including total shots, people, and files.
Returns all people, shots, and files changed since the given timestamp. If no `since` parameter is provided, returns everything (full sync).

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: ISO8601 timestamp. If omitted, returns everything (full sync).

get.description: Return the current server version string.

AddManualFacePayload.description:
POST /api/files/:id/faces - manually add a face bounding box.
The server computes the embedding from the given bbox coordinates.

AuthConfigResponse.description: Response for the auth config endpoint.

BatchReassignPayload.description: POST /api/shots/batch/reassign - batch set primary_person_id, assign new folder numbers, set confirmed.

CreatePersonPayload.description: Create a new person with a name

FaceSuggestion.description:
Get suggested persons for a face based on embedding similarity.

Computes cosine similarity on-the-fly between the target face and the
thumbnail face of every person, so results are always up-to-date even
for newly created persons.

MergePeoplePayload.description: Merge two people: move all faces from source to target, then delete source

MergeShotsPayload.description: POST /api/shots/merge - move all files from source to target shot. Delete source.

OrganizeStatsResponse.description: Return detailed organize stats about the library

PersonFaceBrief.description: Get up to 12 face IDs with thumbnail URLs for a person

PersonMeta.description:
Browse a person: returns person metadata + all shots + all files per shot.
Solves the N+1 problem for the mobile client.

ReassignFacePayload.description: Reassign a face to a different person

SessionClaims.description: JWT claims for the user session cookie.

SplitShotPayload.description:
POST /api/shots/:id/split - create new shot from specified files.
New shot inherits primary person from faces. Both shots get review_status = 'pending'.

StatsResponse.description: Return aggregate stats about the library

since.description: ISO8601 timestamp. If omitted, returns everything (full sync).

sync_token.description: ISO8601 timestamp to use as `since` in the next request.

UpdateShotPayload.description:
PUT /api/shots/:id - update primary_person_id and/or review_status.
When primary_person changes, assign new folder_number (MAX+1 for that person).

username.description: The WebDAV username (OIDC sub in multi-user mode, "phos" in single-user).

session_cookie.description: Session JWT set as HttpOnly cookie (phos_session) after OIDC login
